content: ~ This slide is perfectly flat (0 pitch, 0 yaw).
~ Your camera should be looking straight forward.
~ Press Space to begin the ascent.
~ The camera should now be hovering above and looking down.
~ Notice how the text hologram perfectly hugs the angled surface.
~ We are almost completely flat on our back.
~ The camera should be looking almost straight up at the ceiling.
~ Asteroids will completely clip through this until we fix the OBB physics!
~ The ultimate test of the 3D matrix.
~ The slide is rotated to the side AND tilted backwards.
~ If the text lines up perfectly here, the render pipeline is flawless.
